lines.english: A: Hello!
lines.pinyin: Wéi!

lines.english: B: Is Mrs. Lin there?
lines.pinyin: Qǐng wèn Lín tài tài zài ma?

lines.english: A: She is not around. May I know who's calling?
lines.pinyin: Tā bú zài. Qǐng wèn nǎ lǐ zhǎo?

lines.english: B: I'm her friend. I'm Mrs. Luo.
lines.chinese: 我是她的朋友。我是羅太太。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shì tā de péng yǒu. Wǒ shì Luó tài tài.

lines.english: A: How are you Mrs. Luo? Do you want to leave any message?
lines.pinyin: Luó tài tài hǎo. Nǐ yào liú huà ma?

lines.english: B: Please ask her to return my call.
lines.pinyin: Qǐng tā huí diàn huà gěi wǒ.

lines.english: A: Okay! Does she know your telephone number?
lines.chinese: 好的! 她知道你的電話號碼嗎?
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de! Tā zhī dào nǐ de diàn huà hào mǎ ma?

lines.english: B: My telephone number is 2467089.
lines.pinyin: Wǒ de diàn huà hào mǎ shì èr sì liù qī líng bā jiǔ.

lines.english: A: I will tell her when she arrives.
lines.pinyin: Tā huí lái wǒ huì gào sù tā.

lines.english: B: Thank you!
lines.pinyin: Xiè xiè nǐ.

lines.english: A: You're welcome!
lines.pinyin: Bú kè qì.

lines.english: B: Good bye!
lines.pinyin: Zài jiàn!

lines.english: A: Miss Chen how are you? Please come in.
lines.chinese: 陳小姐, 你好。請進來。
lines.pinyin: Chén xiǎo jiě, nǐ hǎo. Qǐng jìn lái.

lines.english: B: Thank you! Is Mrs. Fang here?
lines.pinyin: Xiè xiè! Fāng tài tài zài ma?

lines.english: A: She's here. Please take a seat.
lines.pinyin: Tā zài. Nǐ qǐng zuò.

lines.english: B: Okay!
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de.

lines.english: A: Madam is taking her bath. Please wait for a while.
lines.chinese: 太太在洗澡。請你等一下。
lines.pinyin: Tài tài zài xǐ zǎo. Qǐng nǐ děng yí xià.

lines.english: B: Okay! I'll just wait for her.
lines.chinese: 沒關係! 我在這裡等她。
lines.pinyin: Méi guān xì! Wǒ zài zhè lǐ děng tā.

lines.english: A: Miss Chen please have a cup of tea.
lines.pinyin: Chén xiǎo jiě qǐng hē chá.

lines.english: B: Thank you!
lines.pinyin: Xiè xiè!

lines.english: A: You're welcome! Here's some newspapers. You might want to read while waiting.
lines.chinese: 不客氣! 這裡有報紙。請看報紙。
lines.pinyin: Bú kè qì! Zhè lǐ yǒu bào zhǐ. Qǐng kàn bào zhǐ.

lines.english: B: Thank you! You entertain guest so well.
lines.chinese: 謝謝! 你很會招待客人。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xiè! Nǐ hěn huì zhāo dài kè rén.

lines.english: A: This is my job.
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì wǒ de gōng zuò.

lines.english: B: Mrs. Fang is so lucky to have a maid like you.
lines.chinese: 方太太有你這麼好的傭人真福氣。
lines.pinyin: Fāng tài tài yǒu nǐ zhè me hǎo de yōng rén zhēn fú qì.

lines.english: A: How much is the apple?
lines.pinyin: Píng guǒ duō shǎo qián?

lines.english: B: NT$12 each.
lines.pinyin: Shí èr kuài yí gè.

lines.english: A: Too expensive. Can you lower the price?
lines.chinese: 太貴了。可以便宜一點嗎?
lines.pinyin: Tài guì le. Kě yǐ pián yí yì diǎn ma?

lines.english: B: How much do you want?
lines.pinyin: Nǐ yào duō shǎo qián?

lines.english: A: Can I have it at NT$10 each?
lines.pinyin: Kě yǐ shí kuài yí gè ma?

lines.english: B: Okay! How many do you want?
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de. Nǐ yào jǐ gè?

lines.english: A: Please give me 5 pieces.
lines.pinyin: Qǐng gěi wǒ wǔ gè.

lines.english: B: Do you need some other fruits?
lines.pinyin: Hái yào qí tā shuǐ guǒ ma?

lines.english: A: How much is the water melon?
lines.pinyin: Xī guā duō shǎo qián?

lines.english: B: NT$70 each.
lines.pinyin: Qī shí kuài yí gè.

lines.english: A: Give me one. How much is the total?
lines.pinyin: Gěi wǒ yí gè. Yí gòng duō shǎo qián?

lines.english: B: Total is NT$120.
lines.pinyin: Yí gòng yì bǎi èr shí kuài.

lines.english: A: Miss what are you looking for?
lines.pinyin: Xiǎo jiě xū yào shé me ma?

lines.english: B: I want to buy polo shirt.
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yào mǎi chèn shān.

lines.english: A: Do you like this one?
lines.pinyin: Zhè jiàn nǐ xǐ huān ma?

lines.english: B: This one is very nice. How much?
lines.pinyin: Zhè jiàn hěn piào liàng. Duō shǎo qián?
Sān bǎi kuài.

lines.english: B: Very cheap. Do you have other colors?
lines.chinese: 很便宜。你們有其他顏色嗎?
lines.pinyin: Hěn pián yí. Nǐ mén yǒu qí tā yán sè ma?

lines.english: A: We have white and red.
lines.pinyin: Wǒ mén yǒu bái sè hé hóng sè.

lines.english: B: I want the white one.
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yào bái sè.

lines.english: A: What size?
lines.pinyin: Nǐ yào shé me mǎ?

lines.english: B: I want medium size. Can I fit it?
lines.chinese: 我要中碼。我可以試穿嗎?
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yào zhōng mǎ. Wǒ kě yǐ shì chuān ma?

lines.english: A: No problem! Fitting room is over there.
lines.chinese: 沒問題! 更衣室在那邊。
lines.pinyin: Méi wèn tí! Gēng yī shì zài nà biān.

lines.english: B: Thank you!
lines.pinyin: Xiè xiè!

lines.english: A: You're welcome!
lines.pinyin: Bú kè qì!

lines.english: A: Miss may I have your order please?
lines.chinese: 小姐請問你要點什麼菜?
lines.pinyin: Xiǎo jiě qǐng wèn nǐ yào diǎn shé me cài?

lines.english: B: Please give me one plate of vegetables and one plate of tofu.
lines.chinese: 請給我一盤青菜和一盤豆腐。
lines.pinyin: Qǐng gěi wǒ yì pán qīng cài hé yì pán dòu fǔ.

lines.english: A: Do you want to try our steak?
lines.chinese: 要不要試試我們的牛排?
lines.pinyin: Yào bú yào shì shì wǒ mén de niú pái?

lines.english: B: No!
lines.pinyin: Bú yào!

lines.english: A: Do you want to have some drinks?
lines.pinyin: Yào bú yào hē shé me yǐn liào?

lines.english: B: Please give me a glass of coke.
lines.pinyin: Qǐng gěi wǒ yì bēi kě lè.

lines.english: A: Okay! Do you want to order anything else?
lines.chinese: 好的! 還有沒有其他需要的?
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de! Hái yǒu méi yǒu qí tā xū yào de?

lines.english: B: That would be all.
lines.pinyin: Méi yǒu le.

lines.english: A: Thank you.
lines.pinyin: Xiè xiè!

lines.english: B: Please make it fast. I'm in a hurry.
lines.pinyin: Qǐng kuài yì diǎn. Wǒ zài gǎn shí jiān.

lines.english: A: No problem. I will serve it as fast as I can.
lines.chinese: 沒問題! 我儘快送來。
lines.pinyin: Méi wèn tí! Wǒ jìn kuài sòng lái.

lines.english: B: Thank you.
lines.pinyin: Xiè xiè!

lines.english: A: You're welcome!
lines.pinyin: Bú kè qì!

lines.english: A: Miss, is this the bus station going to Taipei?
lines.chinese: 小姐, 這是到台北的公車站嗎?
lines.pinyin: Xiǎo jiě, zhè shì dào Tái běi de gōng chē zhàn ma?

lines.english: B: Yes! Do you want to buy ticket?
lines.pinyin: Shì de! Nǐ yào mǎi piào ma?

lines.english: A: How much is the fare?
lines.pinyin: Qǐng wèn chē fèi duō shǎo qián?
Shí bā kuài.

lines.english: A: How long would it take for the bus ride to reach Taipei?
lines.chinese: 從這裡坐公車到台北要多久?
lines.pinyin: Cóng zhè lǐ zuò gōng chē dào Tái Běi yào duō jiǔ?

lines.english: B: Around 45 minutes.
lines.pinyin: Dà yuē sì shí wǔ fēn zhōng.

lines.english: A: How long is the interval for each bus schedule?
lines.pinyin: Duō jiǔ yì bān chē?

lines.english: B: Half hour interval for each bus.
lines.pinyin: Bàn gè xiǎo shí yì bān.

lines.english: A: That's too long. I'm in a hurry.
lines.pinyin: Tài jiǔ le. Wǒ zài gǎn shí jiān.

lines.english: B: You can take MRT. MRT is over there.
lines.chinese: 你可以搭捷運。捷運在那邊。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ kě yǐ dā jié yùn. Jié yùn zài nà biān.

lines.english: A: Thank you!
lines.pinyin: Xiè xiè nǐ!

lines.english: B: You're welcome!
lines.pinyin: Bú kè qì!
